About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a state government agency responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government posts in Uttar Pradesh, India.

UPSSSC was established to provide a fair and transparent recruitment process for government jobs in the state.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Stenographer Recruitment 2024 is a government job recruitment program aimed at filling 661 stenographer posts in various government departments in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The program is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selection process involves a written exam and a typing test.
